libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: If adapting the existing tests for 9.4.0.RC1, update WebAppClassLoader.Context implementations to the 9.4 API: isSystemClass(Class<?>), isServerClass(Class<?>), isSystemResource(String, URL), and isServerResource(String, URL). Embedded localhost WebAppContext tests using a temporary webapp directory should be sufficient; no external service setup is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8856 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-webapp:9.4.0.RC1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Jetty 9.4.0.RC1 is an old release candidate with API differences from 9.3.x, so tests copied from the older version may not compile without source changes.
Broader webapp annotation scanning scenarios may require optional Jetty modules, but descriptor/classloader coverage for jetty-webapp does not require adding them up front.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; jetty-webapp brings the Jetty modules needed for embedded WebAppContext/classloader coverage, and the reported failure is a test-source API mismatch in WebAppClassLoader.Context for Jetty 9.4.0.RC1.
